content: Autonomous curiosity intrinsic motivation modules (like ICM from curiosity-driven RL agents) can act as built-in active samplers for long-term memory in 2024-2025 SOTA agent memory systems, prioritizing encoding unexpected, high-learning-gain experiences over frequent but low-information routine observations. This redefines memory compression not as a task of retaining the most accessed entries, but as a dynamic process aligned with the agent's ongoing autonomous learning objectives.
